series_metadata.series_title: Network Expansion Construction - Federal Aid File
series_metadata.series_description: A) File No. EBFP-290-T; Federal Matching Grant #OEG-O-72-8723 (342) $358,370 for construction of Studio - Transmitter Microwave Relay System at Alliance-Salem, Ohio. B) File No. EBFP-297-T; Federal Matching Grant #OEG-O-72-8724 (342) $141,520 for construction of Multi-Hop Studio-Transmitter Relay System; Athens to Cambridge, Ohio. C) Rotary Account 601, Program 04 was used to account for the funds received & expended by fiscal year, ledger cards, expenditure reports copies and backup are maintained.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office audit, and audit report is released
